columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp when the event was ingested into Microsoft Sentinel

columns.name: abx_body
columns.description: Generic Abnormal Security event payload (fallback for unrecognized event types)

columns.name: abx_metadata
columns.description: Full event metadata object containing event_type, timestamp, and trace_id

columns.name: abx_metadata_event_type_s
columns.description: Event type identifier from top-level abx_metadata
